q: before writing any code enumerate a checkable exit list then verify each item passed afterward
which bash hook blocks mutations of protected paths like migrations and env
the gate that refuses edits to contract schema and governance zones
hook that forces a task to be classified before any work begins
hook escalating edits that touch auth money or row level security to a human
loop that recovers from a production incident with reversing actions first
loop that bisects git history down to the single culprit commit
loop that measures a baseline against a budget and adds a performance gate
loop that implements exactly one roadmap stage up to its gate checkpoint
